priority.description: Generate all 5 figure files (gen_pipeline.pdf, fig1_layer_absorption.pdf, fig2_dict_size.pdf, fig4_layer4_histogram.pdf, fig3_faithfulness.pdf) and place in writing/figures/ directory. Data sources: h1_pilot.json, h3_pilot.json, h4_pilot.json, pilots/h5_pilot.json.

Resolve H1 layer discrepancy in Section 5.1: clarify that layer 8 was the primary test layer with layer 4 as exploratory. State explicitly that the inverted-U pattern (0.19% at layer 8 vs 49.3% at layer 4) is consistent with H3's finding about layer-dependent absorption.

Remove Section 5.5 self-undermining editorializing ('the decision to not run H2 was not data-driven'). Replace with factual reporting: H2 was not tested due to early termination after H1/H3/H4 failures; a redesigned H2 would use layer 4 as the primary test layer (49.3% absorption, sufficient variance).

Align H2 justification in Section 5.5 with H4 design flaw explanation in Section 5.3. Section 5.3 explains H4 failure as task-agnostic selection; Section 5.5 uses insufficient-variance rationale for skipping H2, but layer 4 has 260x more absorbed latents. Use consistent framing: early termination after multiple falsifications.
Remove Section 5.7 redundancy (Table 2 duplicates Table 1's summary). Either integrate Table 2 into Section 5.6 as a second table or move Section 5.7 to the Appendix.
Add data source and generation method to all figure captions. Format: 'Generated via matplotlib from iter_002/exp/results/[source_file].'
Add code reference or attachment for absorption score computation and H1-H5 pilot experiments. Reproducibility requires the experimental code to be available.

summary: 7 action items identified: 2 critical (missing figures, H1 layer discrepancy), 2 major (Section 5.5 self-undermining, H2/H4 justification inconsistency), 3 minor (redundancy, figure captions, code reference).
